channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Rogers Sports and Media is closing its Sportsnet 650 radio s…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Rogers Sports and Media is closing its Sportsnet 650 radio station in Vancouver, Sportsnet 960 station in Calgary, and four other stations, affecting 80 workers (Sammy Hudes/Canadian Press)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Rogers Sports and Media is closing its Sportsnet 650 radio station in Vancouver, Sportsnet 960 station in Calgary, and four other stations, affecting 80 workers (Sammy Hudes/Canadian Press)

item.title: During a meeting with Turkish President Erdogan, ahead of th…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: During a meeting with Turkish President Erdogan, ahead of the NATO summit, President Trump expressed openness to the U.S. resuming sales of F-35 fighter jets to Turkey. During his first term, Trump excluded Turkey from the fighter jet program when Turkey bought an air defense system from Russia.
item.content:encoded: During a meeting with Turkish President Erdogan, ahead of the NATO summit, President Trump expressed openness to the U.S. resuming sales of F-35 fighter jets to Turkey. During his first term, Trump excluded Turkey from the fighter jet program when Turkey bought an air defense system from Russia.

item.title: The best products aren't always the most expensive ones. The…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The best products aren't always the most expensive ones. These are the simple, affordable items that have improved our coworkers' lives. nyti.ms/3Rnz159
item.content:encoded: The best products aren't always the most expensive ones. These are the simple, affordable items that have improved our coworkers' lives. nyti.ms/3Rnz159

item.title: JUST IN: French far-right leader Marine Le Pen announced tha…

item.description: JUST IN: French far-right leader Marine Le Pen announced that she will run for president in 2027 after an appeals court shortened her ban on holding public office reut.rs/4f41JzQ

item.title: The president says he has "saved" crypto, but some believe h…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: The president says he has "saved" crypto, but some believe he could do more to halt Bitcoin's ongoing decline.

item.title: Former Dallas Cowboys defensive end Marshawn Kneeland, who d…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Former Dallas Cowboys defensive end Marshawn Kneeland, who died by suicide in November 2025 after a high-speed chase with police, had a brain abnormality linked to repeated concussions, his family announces.
item.content:encoded: Former Dallas Cowboys defensive end Marshawn Kneeland, who died by suicide in November 2025 after a high-speed chase with police, had a brain abnormality linked to repeated concussions, his family announces.

item.title: Mayor Zohran Mamdani said a high-profile housing project und…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani said a high-profile housing project under construction near Grand Central that's at risk of collapse was still unstable Tuesday afternoon. He warned New Yorkers to avoid 40th to 45th Streets, between First and Third Avenues.
item.content:encoded: Mayor Zohran Mamdani said a high-profile housing project under construction near Grand Central that's at risk of collapse was still unstable Tuesday afternoon. He warned New Yorkers to avoid 40th to 45th Streets, between First and Third Avenues.

item.title: Argentina avoids a massive upset, scoring three goals after …
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Argentina avoids a massive upset, scoring three goals after the 75th minute to defeat Egypt 3-2 and advance to the World Cup quarterfinals. https://cnn.it/4paMVEb

item.title: The FTC approves James Murdoch's $300M+ purchase of New York…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
The FTC approves James Murdoch's $300M+ purchase of New York magazine, Vox.com, and Vox's podcast network, per an early termination notice on the FTC's website (Lucas Manfredi/The Wrap)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:

item.description: “Dolly: A True Original Musical,” a long-in-the-works show about the country queen Dolly Parton’s life and career, will begin performances on Broadway in December. nyti.ms/44hWnfq

item.title: The 141-year-old brick manufacturer Belden Brick is among ma…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: The 141-year-old brick manufacturer Belden Brick is among many manufacturers across America’s heartland where costs are rising as power-hungry data centers serving the artificial-intelligence industry ‌proliferate reut.rs/4wn4OlI
item.content:encoded: The 141-year-old brick manufacturer Belden Brick is among many manufacturers across America’s heartland where costs are rising as power-hungry data centers serving the artificial-intelligence industry ‌proliferate reut.rs/4wn4OlI

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Argentina made an all-time …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Argentina made an all-time great World Cup comeback to defeat Egypt 3-2. The defending World Cup champions scored three late goals, one by Lionel Messi, to escape the upset.

Read about the incredible World Cup classic: nyti.ms/4wpP0OX
item.content:encoded:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Argentina made an all-time great World Cup comeback to defeat Egypt 3-2. The defending World Cup champions scored three late goals, one by Lionel Messi, to escape the upset.

Read about the incredible World Cup classic: nyti.ms/4wpP0OX

item.title: #🔖エンタメ 「出場停止を解除する方法を見つけろ」トランプが指示の報も…W杯バログン“超法規的”出場もベルギーに1-4…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖エンタメ
「出場停止を解除する方法を見つけろ」トランプが指示の報も…W杯バログン“超法規的”出場もベルギーに1-4完敗　米国代表が陥った「最悪の先例」の代償（一野洋）

北中米W杯のラウンド16が7月6日（日本時間7日）に行われ、開催国のアメリカ代表がベルギー代表に1-4で敗退した。この試合を巡っては、アメリカ代表のフォラリン・バログンの出場停止処分が猶予される異例の事態に賛否両論が渦巻いていた。はたしてその“当事者”だったアメリカメディアはこの狂騒をどう報じていたのだろう...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖エンタメ
「出場停止を解除する方法を見つけろ」トランプが指示の報も…W杯バログン“超法規的”出場もベルギーに1-4完敗　米国代表が陥った「最悪の先例」の代償（一野洋）

北中米W杯のラウンド16が7月6日（日本時間7日）に行われ、開催国のアメリカ代表がベルギー代表に1-4で敗退した。この試合を巡っては、アメリカ代表のフォラリン・バログンの出場停止処分が猶予される異例の事態に賛否両論が渦巻いていた。はたしてその“当事者”だったアメリカメディアはこの狂騒をどう報じていたのだろう...

item.title: The European Union aims to increase the amount of protein fe…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: The European Union aims to increase the amount of protein feed crops, such as soybeans, that are sourced from within the 27-nation bloc, cutting its dependency on top suppliers like the US and Brazil.
item.content:encoded: The European Union aims to increase the amount of protein feed crops, such as soybeans, that are sourced from within the 27-nation bloc, cutting its dependency on top suppliers like the US and Brazil.

item.title: Cyclosporiasis tends to occur during the warm summer months,…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Cyclosporiasis tends to occur during the warm summer months, but several states are reporting increases in cases beyond what they would normally expect at this point in the year. https://cnn.it/4y439mR
item.content:encoded: Cyclosporiasis tends to occur during the warm summer months, but several states are reporting increases in cases beyond what they would normally expect at this point in the year. https://cnn.it/4y439mR

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Lionel Messi scored a stunn…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Lionel Messi scored a stunning late goal and Argentina has come back from behind to level 2-2 with Egypt. It's a World Cup classic in Atlanta with just 5 minutes of regulation time left. nyti.ms/4aH1YzH
item.content:encoded: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Lionel Messi scored a stunning late goal and Argentina has come back from behind to level 2-2 with Egypt. It's a World Cup classic in Atlanta with just 5 minutes of regulation time left. nyti.ms/4aH1YzH

item.title: Hungarian public media outlets Kossuth and M1 suspend their …
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Hungarian public media outlets Kossuth and M1 suspend their broadcasts; M1's message reads, "Public media should not lie. We are sorry for doing it for so long" (Deborah Cole/The Guardian)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Hungarian public media outlets Kossuth and M1 suspend their broadcasts; M1's message reads, "Public media should not lie. We are sorry for doing it for so long" (Deborah Cole/The Guardian)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.description: Sidestepping concerns about the affordability crisis, Democrats’ Project 2029 is going after tech companies and junk fees first.

item.title: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani says there are no injurie…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani says there are no injuries following the buckling of two columns inside of a 37-story Manhattan building on East 42nd Street. A frozen zone remains in place from 40th to 45th streets between First and Third avenues.
item.content:encoded: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani says there are no injuries following the buckling of two columns inside of a 37-story Manhattan building on East 42nd Street. A frozen zone remains in place from 40th to 45th streets between First and Third avenues.

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Mostafa Zico scored a vital…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Mostafa Zico scored a vital second goal for Egypt, and this time VAR won't save Argentina.

Egypt stunningly lead the world champions 2-0 with less than 20 minutes left. nyti.ms/3RjwvwR
item.content:encoded:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Mostafa Zico scored a vital second goal for Egypt, and this time VAR won't save Argentina.

Egypt stunningly lead the world champions 2-0 with less than 20 minutes left. nyti.ms/3RjwvwR

item.title: From @theathletic.com: Dallas Cowboys defensive end Marshawn…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathletic.com: Dallas Cowboys defensive end Marshawn Kneeland, who died in November 2025 from a self-inflicted gunshot wound, has been diagnosed with Stage 1 CTE. He was 24 years old.
item.content:encoded: From @theathletic.com: Dallas Cowboys defensive end Marshawn Kneeland, who died in November 2025 from a self-inflicted gunshot wound, has been diagnosed with Stage 1 CTE. He was 24 years old.

item.title: EXCLUSIVE: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu tells C…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: EXCLUSIVE: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu tells CNN he opposes potential US sale of F-35 jets to Turkey as he downplays divisions with President Trump. https://cnn.it/4gr8vlG
item.content:encoded: EXCLUSIVE: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu tells CNN he opposes potential US sale of F-35 jets to Turkey as he downplays divisions with President Trump. https://cnn.it/4gr8vlG

item.title: Four animated titles from Disney, DreamWorks, and Pixar made…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Four animated titles from Disney, DreamWorks, and Pixar made up over 38% of the ~$186.6M handed out to 41 new movies selected to receive California tax credits (Winston Cho/The Hollywood Reporter)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Four animated titles from Disney, DreamWorks, and Pixar made up over 38% of the ~$186.6M handed out to 41 new movies selected to receive California tax credits (Winston Cho/The Hollywood Reporter)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.title: Sen. Elizabeth Warren asks seven American tech companies for…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren asks seven American tech companies for information about their engagement with the U.S. military, underscoring concerns about the Defense Department’s opaque AI arrangements.
item.content:encoded: Sen. Elizabeth Warren asks seven American tech companies for information about their engagement with the U.S. military, underscoring concerns about the Defense Department’s opaque AI arrangements.

item.title: President Trump's fireworks spectacular blanketed Washington…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: President Trump's fireworks spectacular blanketed Washington, D.C., with unhealthy air, according to air testing data. Pollution in the form of fine particulate matter — tiny particles that can contribute to asthma, heart disease and other ailments — peaked at more than six times normal levels.
item.content:encoded: President Trump's fireworks spectacular blanketed Washington, D.C., with unhealthy air, according to air testing data. Pollution in the form of fine particulate matter — tiny particles that can contribute to asthma, heart disease and other ailments — peaked at more than six times normal levels.
